transcript.text:
[A challenger?]
[Wait a min...]
[The soccer siblings?!]
[But 2 will be easy]
[Just wait and see]
[Because...]
[Comedian Kim Minkyung]
I've had 10+ bowls of rice
Did we start already?
It's war
[What's for today?]
[1v3 Pork Belly War]
[These challengers are different...]
How full are you?
40%?
Really 40%?

I don't really feel anything
Are you serious?
2kgs more, please
[2nd phase of war...]
Are you still hungry?
About 50% now
I thought you said it was 40% not too long ago
Why is it going up so slow?
[Where is Tzuyang headed?]
I'm nervous
I'm picking up people I've only seen on TV
True world stars
There they are
[This ray of light]
[Locked]
[Wait a sec...]

Hello
[Lee Kang In and Lee Jung Eun soccer siblings]
[South Korea's representative attacking mid-fielder]
[Skillful Boss: Lee Kang In]
[Lee Jung Eun] [As good as her younger brother]
-It's really cool to meet you in person -Same!
I said hello through the video call last time
I really enjoy the show "Kick a Goal"
This is really cool
-You have a driver's license, right? -Yes, of course
I stacked the kilometers for the first time on KT Odaejang last time
Have you done a lot?
I've done it...
-It was a good amount -Someone ruined it
What? How?
[Played against firefighters for kilometers on a variety show]

Someone ruined it all
I was too tired
That was still good
The reason why're here together is that...
Gas prices have went up a lot
So transport businesses have not been doing too well
Today's challenge is related to helping those transport businesses
That's the reason why we recruited someone that's fit for the job
I can easily take 3v1
We'll see about that
I have a question
You get full from food, right?
Then how do you keep eating?
-That's such a boring question. Imagine how many times she gets asked that -Well, I'm truly curious
Oh, wait!
[Challenger spotted]

[Someone that's fit for the job...]
[Through the window?]
[3rd player...]
[There you are!]
What's going on?
[Comedian Kim Minkyung]
[A powerful eater]
[Kim Minkyung]
I happen to be the assistant How are you?
You 2 look just like each other
So what are we eating today?
-Ms. Tzuyang? -Oh yes, today
I always watch your mukbang and wonder how you can eat like that
And how do you stay in shape? I've been curious
I don't really do anything to keep in shape
I don't want to hear that

I think all girls can relate
Did we already start?
It's war
How much can you eat?
I'm pretty good at eating meat
What do you like?
I like Korean food
So I feel pretty good about today's mukbang
I'm actually not that good at eating rice
Then let's go eat rice
I've had 10+ bowls of rice before
Okay we lost
He can do 1 and a half
Can I make a left here?
There's a left turn signal there
Do you have a driver's license?

You can just turn here Oh, this way?
[Let's take the safe route]
[Can we safely make it to the restaurant?]
Children crossing zone
Don't go over 30km, please
[Please drive safe]
We need to drain her energy like this
[We got this!]
You need to eat more than 1 and a half bowls of rice
What if I can't get out?
[Trapped]
There's enough space
Shall we go now?
Can you just leave your number there?
[Can't get your number leaked]
This is called the KT Dual Number

-2 numbers for 1 cell phone -2 numbers for 1 device?
1 original number and a secondary number for public business and stuff
That's really good I want that too
[Let's go]
[This place...]
[Poongnyun Gisanim Shikdang] [Mapo-gu]
[KT supports all Taxi Drivers!] [Drive safe!]
Let's go
This isn't really 3v1
It's actually 1v1
I don't eat that much
But it can be seen like I do because of my size
-But I'm going to eat a lot today -That's right!
We're not even close to Tzuyang's level
She might not be able to eat a lot today
We're feeling good

[Only 1 way to find out!]
The reason why we're here today is because
People that drive around for a living are going through a tough time because of inflated gas prices
So we will do a competition today
And the loser will pay for the drivers' meals for the next 24 hours at this restaurant
Then we can lose today
We have Kang In
-Did you bring your card? -Card? I left it at home
That person over there is making a good amount these days
Win or lose, we're doing something good so let's just enjoy it
Sorry to tell you this, but you can lose too
[Just kidding]
You better not say that you're full after like 1 plate
Whoever says "I'm full" first pays the bills
Just don't say those words
We will start lightly with 2kgs of meat each side

We're doomed
It looks like we have more
No, I have more
These are thicker
Once we start, the drivers that dine here will eat for free for the next 24 hours
We're here to show support to those working in the transport business
Fighting!
[3v1 pork belly competition start!]
[Paying for all the food]
-Thank you for the food -Hello
[All thanks to you guys]
We're living in a hard time because of the gas prices
[Explaining how much he used to put vs now]
[And it stacks if you look at the monthly expenses]
Cheer up today It's hot!
[Drive safe, sir!]

It's really exhausting
That's why it's so hard to catch a cab now
[They are still working very hard on hot days]
It's pretty critical for all of us
[It's hard but can't give up]
It's really tough LPG gas prices are too high
The company is going through complications
[KT Odaejang is here to show support]
They still spend the gas even if there are no customers
So some just stay home to save money
The fire is pretty good on that side
Not good
Should I lower it?
You should've done it secretly
There's no time limit, right?
Yes, take your time

You eat a lot slowly, right?
Yes, I can take 6 hours sometimes
Eat? Not sleep?
I will go ahead and start then
Yes, eat up
Don't eat from there
Bon appetit
Delicious
Cooked really well
Did you watch the Odaejang episode we did before?
Yes, I watched it right away
The athletes were very excited to do a mukbang
That's embarrassing
[A surprise attack]
Who disappointed you the most?
The 2 baseball players

[These 2]
[Uploaded on 2022.April.15] [KT Odaejang Episode]
They didn't eat much
They were even funny either
They were so boring
I can make it fun
I haven't debuted in shows like that yet
My sister did first
Right, I'm your superior now
What do you mean? I did it when I was a kid
Why is it all coming to me?
Eat a lot
You can eat more if you make lettuce wraps
Lettuce wrap? Me too then
You should've whispered it
[More]

I don't think this will be enough
A little...
Jung Eun is not eating that much
What? Eat
[I'll try]
The person next to me is eating way too fast
It's all gone
What are you guys talking about?
Working out
Are you 2 soccer players?
How does it feel making a goal in a very important game?
I wonder how that feels
I feel good from the moment of the goal to even the next game
I think goal ceremonies are a bit awkward to do
Do you plan and get ready for those?
Those players with their signature ceremonies probably don't

If you think about that before the game,
You won't even make a goal
Maybe it's just jinxed
The person next to you
Her goal ceremony is so whatevers
It got edited out
I planned and made all these ceremonies like making hearts
They didn't even use them
[Goal ceremony]
I need an autograph from Lee Kang In
[That's me]
[Chewing gum that wakes you up] [Gifted to all of the drivers from KT Odaejang]
I didn't even know they were doing this here
I had a great meal I'm taking all the good energy
Everything will be okay
[Enjoy your meal, it's on us!]

[Kang In returns]
You're the most popular amongst the drivers
Yes, of course
My sister is popular too
We went to eat KBBQ
And they recognized me and not him
I was so touched and thankful that they knew who I was
How full are you?
20%
20?!
That's a lie
50% for me
-How about you? -30? 40?
Really 40?
I think around there
We can do this

I don't feel anything yet
Really?!
[Not an easy opponent, that's for sure...]
More you eat, the more kilometers you'll get
[Someone doesn't look too good]
You... you can do it?
Good luck
[I will eat your food too]
I played soccer last time with the hardworking fire fighters
And got 100km per attack point
And the special guest was her
And they said they will multiply it if we make a play together
It would've been easy because you 2 are siblings
We're really not capable
[Oops]
He scolds me too much

[Rare to see siblings get along]
-He kept telling me what to do -Come on now
Is this 2v1?
[Another driver stopping by to thank them]
We prepared this chewing gum to wake you up on the road
[Tzuyang too!]
[The level of happiness doubles because of the power of sharing]
You 3 are doing better than I thought
-We're getting along -Just us 2
That person's not eating
I'm cooling it down
Putting in the effort is important
No, the result is more important
I thought Kang In would be an introvert
But he's not like that at all
He didn't talk much when I was on the phone with him

It's funny because
They did a video call
At 2 in the morning
I don't even know what to say
So it was awkward?
It wasn't awkwardness
It was beyond awkward
So you picked up at 2AM?
[2022.04.15] [KT Odaejang Episode]
They did me wrong
That's too much
His face was all bloated And he was sleepy
[Just eat]
Don't worry, Kang In and I are eating
I think I had like 500 grams?
That's not enough

Excuse me 1kg each side, please
So we get 300km for paying the drivers' meals here for 24 hours
We had 4kgs now and will have 2kgs more That's another 300km
I told you Making a goal is easier
[More meat]
I get that Odaejang is out here doing good deeds
But I don't know much in detail
Odaejang is created with 5 athletes
And we set a goal of 5,000km this year and we stack kilometers by doing good things for the community
After you reach that goal, you will make a donation for the country
What if you don't reach 5,000km?
Then I will call Tzuyang again
When I get back into the season, I check my body fat every month
Because we pay a fine if it goes over a certain number
Some places fine you like 2,000,000 Won and they check you every week (~$1533 USD)
Some even pay like 4,000,000 Won if it's over too much

Because they make a lot of money If it's a small fine, they'll just eat and pay every time
Tzuyang probably has low body fat
I'm pretty low on both fat and muscles
Mystery of the human body...
If you are constantly hard on yourself checking the numbers, it's exhausting
I'm alright so far
Because you're still young
In front of me?
These 2 are friends (born in 1997)
I think I ate everything on that side
[Talking about life]
The fact that I might think too much of the attention
Then quit
I came on the show for you
Me too
Thank you

-Did I do a good job? -Thank you
What do you stress about?
Age
26 is still young
I can't say anything because I'm 22
She's stressing about age
Are you really?
Do you know how much older I am?
The age gap...
How many is that?
Would you like me to do the math?
It's done
I stopped thinking about myself after turning 40
I found more happiness and comfort as I grew older
I'll eat some more
The real competition has started

Do you think you can finish that?
If Kang In comes back
I'll take 4 more pieces
Props
I asked for 4 pieces...
And I see 6
I ate more when I was 22 years old
When was your prime?
I ate the most in middle school
I really like it and it's tasty
And I get angry that I can't eat anymore because I'm full
You get mad?
About something like that?
There's an opportunity for a goal
But your legs give up on you
And you miss Wouldn't you get mad?

I would
Same
We are soccer players
That's why we practice so that doesn't happen
So that it won't happen again
So you should practice more so that you can eat more
He's gaslighting me
Everything sounds right
You're good at talking
Come out on shows more
I'm not good at speaking Korean
-You eat well -And she doesn't cut the meat
-She hasn't been -I'm too lazy
My stomach is about to explode
I was about to get full too
And she says she's stuffed

I totally forgot about it
[Jung Eun lost the bet]
Do you accept?
Because I'm kinda full
I feel like I was the MVP today
I agree
Are you not full?
About 50% now
You were 40% earlier
Why's 10% taking so long?
I'm digesting even faster because I'm talking
We should've planned it better
We lost the competition then
The card will be from here
[Continues eating]
You say that but why do I feel like mine will be used?

That's up to the family
We don't need to be family anymore
-You burn bridges over KBBQ? -Yes
Very possible
Aren't you eating more?
She's such a good eater
I watch mukbangs a lot when I can't eat too much from watching my body fat
So I just watch it
Which ones?
I watch Tzuyang's
There are other mukbangers?
-Aren't you best with meat? -Sure
Then why did we eat meat?
She said she wasn't good at eating rice
And she had 13 bowls before?
I had up to 5

I did about 5 too
I've done 4
14 total
We would've won if it was rice
[We need a rematch next time!]
Odaejang and Oh Yes did a collaboration
[My favorite]
Let's eat it for dessert
There's a fun mission
Eat this in 1 bite
[An example]
You can stop now
But it still fits
Try it
I've done that a lot too because
You crave sweets during class

[What happened?]
Now for some dessert
Looked like she got a botox
He's good at talking
I've never seen this side of him
I had 3kgs of pork belly
But you guys didn't finish the plate
But we will round it up
So a total of 600km today
We'll do 100km per 1kg of meat
300+600=900km
[Tzuyang X KT Odaejang 900km]
I'm so happy that we got together do give to the community
Thanks for the meal~!
Thank you
She's really good at soccer

Right?
She does everything by herself
[We hope everyone can get through the hard times]
[We were able to gift a little bit of happiness today]
[Please be safe on the road]
[Tzuyang and KT Odaejang are here to support]
It's already hard enough because of the hot weather
So we will be by these drivers to show support
We were able to help the taxi drivers today
But I want to shout out to all of those in the transport business
Run! Odaejang!
[Now for the bill...]
Is she your sister? Do you know her?
Who?
[Kang In took care of the bill ^^] [Subtitles by Anthony Hyun Choi] [antchoi91@gmail.com]
